title: Spear logic
wikitext:
[]: Spear logic             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Sun Apr 03, 2016 1:10 pm Alright, so we know from Kaworu's words (And i think we can all agree he was being genuinly honest at this point) that Gendo swapping the spears had a significant effect on how 4I played out, however Fuyutski later says that it went almost exactly as Seele wanted. So, what exactly did swapping the spears accomplish if the event was going to be near-identical anyway?

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 03, 2016 2:08 pm I think it's implied that the Spears weren't so much "swapped" as one of them reverted into Longinus form for reasons unknown. A similar question would be, if all four of the Spears were Longinus shaped at Second Impact, why did one of them turn Cassius after it was blasted off to the Moon? I dunno lol. As for your main question, only thing I can think of is that requiring Longinus and Cassius together wasn't necessary for Seele's plans, only Kaworu's. He's called "Seele's Boy" and all, but I'd assume the stalker-ish "making Shinji-kun happy" side of things is exclusively his own.

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Apr 03, 2016 2:23 pm ^One of the spears in the 2nd Impact flashback seems to have a smooth shaft while the other three are obviously notched and spiraled. Killing Kaworu was the net gain on Gendo and Fuyutsuki's side. Seele wasn't counting on that happening and Kaworu says it was his demotion to the 13th Angel that set the whole thing off. Nobody turned into a god-like Eva creature, so something didn't go according to expectations. I wonder if the Spears are supposed to act like conductors, with one being "positive" and one being "negative." Look at the set-up in Eva 13: Angel+Lilin Adam+Lilith(+Angel) And ideally, Cassius+Longinus. Eva 13 represents...a duality of opposing elements coming together, I suppose, which fits with Seele's plan to forcefully evolve the Lilin by sacrificing and resurrecting them so they're complemented with the Fruit of Life. I think the second Spear of Longinus somehow disrupted the flow of the process and resulted in a backlash that hit Kaworu and the Eva instead. Check this out, Right after Unit 13 eats the 12th Angel, the glowing parts on the Eva glow more brightly, the Eva trembles, and the Spears light up bright pink: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Apr 03, 2016 3:04 pm look again. they didn't lose their glow so much as it's just being washed out by how bright 13 is.. there's still a faint pinkish aura around them.

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Apr 03, 2016 3:32 pm That wasn't the best shot. The Spears do fade back to red right after the Eva awakens: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Apr 03, 2016 3:34 pm There's still red glow there too. It's not as bright, yes, but it's still there.

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 03, 2016 4:15 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: ^One of the spears in the 2nd Impact flashback seems to have a smooth shaft while the other three are obviously notched and spiraled.

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Apr 03, 2016 4:34 pm Possibly! The Longinus-types can shapeshift from a pitchfork to a spear to a super long spear (and that weird helix shape in EoE), so one Spear turning into another isn't that outlandish, I guess. Weird that they never question how they might be able to change it back to the Cassius type if that's the case.

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by cowman850 » Mon Apr 11, 2016 4:37 am BlueBasilisk wrote: Possibly! The Longinus-types can shapeshift from a pitchfork to a spear to a super long spear (and that weird helix shape in EoE), so one Spear turning into another isn't that outlandish, I guess. Weird that they never question how they might be able to change it back to the Cassius type if that's the case.

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Apr 11, 2016 5:10 am cowman850 wrote: This, and the Lance-copies from EoE converting to "ooken", and EVA-05's jousting lance.

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 11, 2016 7:32 am Sachi wrote: Unit-05's lance is just another melee weapon, (...) Completely normal, and not alien or based off alien technology, as with the case of Longinus, Cassius, and the Longinus replicas.

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Apr 11, 2016 11:54 am Reichu wrote: Oh? You sound so certain about this... :-3 Official kanji salad for Eva-05's weapon : 対使徒専用殲滅兵器 簡易式ロンギヌスの槍（似非復元型） Anti-Angel Extermination Weapon Spear of Longinus Basic Type (Pseudo-Restoration)

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by cowman850 » Tue Apr 12, 2016 11:55 am Sachi wrote: Got me. That's certainly very interesting. I wonder what the implications of it are, or if it's just more of the trend of humans mucking with alien tech. The concept was explored more in 2.0 and really driven home with Q. Given all the implications behind the Tunniel and it's containment introduced in the same scene, then I would say it's probably that.

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by Signer » Fri Apr 15, 2016 11:34 am By the way, what does Gendo need an army for? The only assets left in this world seem to be EVAs and spears, but if WILLE had a spear, they would have used it already...

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Apr 15, 2016 4:49 pm Could be to simply stall for time. Wille can't bring all their firepower to bear on Gendo if they have 10,000 idiot Evas to keep tabs on.

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Apr 15, 2016 4:53 pm You mean "Baka Eva's"

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by Signer » Sat Apr 16, 2016 12:30 am But if he has everything he needs, what is there to wait for? Before it was angels and construction of EVA 13, but now the only use for an army seems to be getting EVA 01.

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Apr 16, 2016 1:39 am And where is his wife? Getting Unit-01 surely remains crucial for Gendou.

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Apr 16, 2016 3:19 am Signer wrote: But if he has everything he needs, what is there to wait for? Before it was angels and construction of EVA 13, but now the only use for an army seems to be getting EVA 01.

[]: Re: Spear logic             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 16, 2016 3:32 am pwhodges wrote: And where is his wife? Getting Unit-01 surely remains crucial for Gendou.
